meta.title: Dawri AI — Saudi Pro League Analytics
meta.description: AI-powered analytics, predictions, and deep insights for the Saudi Pro League. Data refreshed daily.

hero.subtitle: AI-powered analytics, predictions, and deep insights — refreshed every day, in Arabic and English.

features.sectionTitle: Built for fans, scouts, and curious minds
features.sectionSubtitle: Premium-grade visualization, transparent AI, and complete bilingual support.

playerProfiles.title: Player Intelligence
playerProfiles.description: Percentile pizza charts, shot maps, form trends, and AI scouting reports for every SPL player.

matchPreview.title: Match Predictions
matchPreview.description: Win/draw/loss probabilities, expected goals, and predicted scorelines — with a transparent "Why?" panel.

compare.title: Side-by-Side Compare
compare.description: Stack up to three players on overlapping radars to see who really edges who.

titleRace.title: Title Race Simulator
titleRace.description: Drag match outcomes and watch the championship probabilities shift in real time.

bilingual.title: Bilingual, Properly
bilingual.description: Full Arabic with right-to-left layout — not a translation hack, a first-class experience.

transparent.title: Transparent AI
transparent.description: Every prediction comes with the exact features that drove it. No black box.

preview.sectionSubtitle: Live previews unlock when the data pipeline goes online.
preview.placeholderText: This panel will populate once the daily data refresh is live.

footer.tagline: Built with open data and open AI.
footer.attribution: Stats sourced from FBref, the official SPL site, Wikidata, and API-Football. Used under fair use with attribution.
footer.disclaimer: Predictions are probabilistic. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
